title: NOTICE265 CANCELLED GST/HST Registration for Listed Financial Institutions (Including Selected Listed Financial Institutions) - Canada.ca
content:
## NOTICE265 CANCELLED GST/HST Registration for Listed Financial Institutions (Including Selected Listed Financial Institutions)

## This publication was cancelled
This publication was cancelled as of 2026-06-03 and replaced with GST/HST memoradum 17-6-2, GST/HST Registration and Reporting Requirements for Listed Financial Institutions, Including Selected Listed Financial Institutions .

### Give feedback about this page
Thank you for your feedback.
